name: Peanut Butter Spritz Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cookie mix, contents of the peanut butter packet from the mix, and egg. Stir until thoroughly blended. Fill the cookie press with dough.
3. Press desired shapes, about 2 inches apart, onto ungreased baking sheets.
4. Bake at 375°F for 7-9 minutes or until set but not browned. Cool for 1 minute on the baking sheets.
5. Cut each milk chocolate bar into 12 sections using the division marks on the bars.
6. To assemble, carefully remove one cookie from the baking sheet.
7. Place one milk chocolate section on the bottom of the warm cookie; top with the second cookie.
8. Press together to make a sandwich. Repeat with remaining cookies.
9. Place sandwich cookies on cooling racks until the chocolate is set. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 2 1/2 to 3 dozen sandwich cookies.
Tip: For best appearance, use cookie press plates that give solid shapes.
